overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a wizarding school video game, showing a red-haired student character exploring an ornate Gothic interior with stained glass windows, encountering a ghost, descending a spiral staircase, and walking through common room areas with other students present.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper portrait gallery with stained glass windows

events.description: translucent ghost of a man in period clothing appears briefly in the hallway

agents.ego_description: walking through an ornate room filled with framed portraits and stained glass windows

entered.detail: tall arched windows with colorful heraldic designs letting in warm light
multiple framed paintings hanging on green wallpapered walls
ornate dark wood furniture with decorative items on top
intricate patterned rug on the wooden floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sunlit upper gallery room with green wallpaper and numerous framed portraits. A translucent ghost appears briefly in the center of the room. Stained glass windows cast colorful light onto the wooden floors and circular rug as the character approaches a spiral staircase.

events.description: character begins descending the spiral staircase

agents.ego_description: walking down a curved wooden staircase with carved balustrades

entered.detail: curved wooden staircase with ornate carved railings
wooden balcony overlooking the stairwell from above

segments.scene_description: The character descends a grand spiral staircase with polished wooden steps and intricate railings. The upper balcony becomes visible above while the stained glass windows recede from view. The lighting becomes slightly dimmer as the character moves to the lower level.

scene_state.functional_zone: common room with seating and notice board

events.description: other students become visible sitting in the common room area

agents.ego_description: walking through the lower common room area past other students

notable_agents.action: students sitting on red couches near the staircase base

entered.detail: large wooden notice board covered with papers and wanted posters
gothic stone archway entrance leading to a corridor
upholstered seating furniture where students are resting
lit wall-mounted lamps providing warm illumination

segments.scene_description: The character enters a cozy common room area with red couches where other students are seated. A large bulletin board covered in notices stands to the right. The character walks toward a stone archway at the far end of the room, passing wall sconces that cast a warm glow on the carpeted floor.

events.description: character enters the stone archway into a narrow corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the stone archway into a dimly lit corridor

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone block walls with gothic architectural details
oval-framed portrait hanging on the corridor wall

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the stone archway into a narrow, dimly lit corridor with rough stone walls. The transition from the warm wooden common room to the cooler stone passage is marked by a change in lighting and texture. An oval portrait hangs on the right wall as the character proceeds deeper into the corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, sunlit gallery through a cozy living area and into a dim stone corridor. It begins in an upper gallery where colorful light from stained glass windows illuminates green wallpaper and framed portraits, briefly passing a translucent ghost before approaching a spiral staircase. As the character descends the polished wooden steps, the bright gallery recedes and the lighting dims, transitioning the scene from the open balcony to the lower level. The camera then moves into a warm common room filled with red couches and students, passing a large bulletin board before heading toward a stone archway. Finally, the environment shifts from the soft textures of the carpeted room to the cool, rough stone of a narrow corridor, where the light fades further as the character passes a single oval portrait.
